title: Ebook AI Platform
bullets: A comprehensive full-stack platform designed to facilitate the generation, consumption, and structural management of ebooks.
Features AI integration workflows assisting users directly in generating engaging book contents.
Includes a highly polished React UI, fortified backend security, and rigorous automated testing across unit and end-to-end layers.

title: C HTTP Server
bullets: A lightweight, multi-threaded HTTP web server engineered entirely from scratch in C.
Implements low-level POSIX socket APIs, robust request parsing, and concurrent connection handling.
Designed to be highly performant, prioritizing minimal memory footprint and fast response times.

title: REST API Architecture
bullets: A production-grade RESTful API structured around clean, scalable architectural principles.
Features robust JWT-based authentication, structured error handling, and comprehensive API design.
Integrated seamlessly with MongoDB for efficient data storage and performance modeling.
